careers.title: Head of Marketing & Growth
careers.overview: We are looking for a Head of Marketing & Growth to lead the expansion of Xponent's technology services. This role is responsible for building our lead generation engine, improving client acquisition, and developing strategic partnerships with businesses and enterprises. This is not a social media role. This is a growth leadership role focused on revenue, client acquisition, and market expansion.
responsibilities: Develop and execute the marketing roadmap for Xponent's services and products
Build a predictable lead generation system using content, webinars, events, and campaigns
Design and improve the sales funnel from lead to closed deal
Work closely with the sales team to improve conversion rates
Develop partnerships with technology vendors, agencies, and enterprise clients
Define messaging and positioning for custom software, AI automation, and digital platform services
Track marketing performance and optimize campaigns
Manage marketing and sales execution team
requirements: 3–7 years experience in marketing, growth, or business development
Experience in B2B technology, SaaS, or software services marketing preferred
Strong understanding of marketing funnels and conversion optimization
Ability to build systems, not just campaigns
Comfortable working with CRM and marketing automation tools
Strong communication and leadership skills
niceToHave: Experience marketing technology services or software development
Startup or agency experience
Growth marketing background
Partnership development experience
Understanding of AI, automation, or enterprise software
successMetrics: Cost per lead and cost per acquisition
whyJoin: Work directly with founders building cutting-edge technology solutions
Opportunity to position a growing technology company in the market
Own the growth strategy instead of executing small tasks
Fast learning startup environment
Impact real businesses through digital transformation

careers.title: Sales Executive
careers.overview: We are hiring Sales Executives to help convert interested businesses into Xponent clients through consultation, needs analysis, and solution presentation. This role focuses on understanding client challenges, communicating our technology capabilities, and closing B2B service deals.
responsibilities: Contact leads through phone, email, and video calls
Understand business challenges and identify technology solutions
Explain Xponent's services clearly to potential clients
Schedule discovery and consultation sessions
Present proposals and service packages
Follow up with interested leads through the sales cycle
Maintain CRM records and pipeline management
Collaborate with technical team on solution scoping
Help improve sales scripts and processes based on feedback
requirements: 1–3 years sales experience (B2B preferred)
Strong communication and presentation skills
Comfortable speaking with business owners and decision-makers
Understanding of technology services or willingness to learn quickly
Organized and disciplined approach to sales process
Goal-oriented mindset
niceToHave: Experience selling software, technology services, or consulting
Understanding of custom software development or AI
CRM experience (HubSpot, Salesforce, etc.)
whyJoin: Sell meaningful technology solutions that transform businesses
Competitive commission structure
Learn about cutting-edge technology (AI, automation, custom software)
Work with a supportive technical team
Grow into senior sales or account management roles

careers.title: Technology Content Writer
careers.overview: We are looking for a Technology Content Writer to help build authority for Xponent through high-quality educational and thought leadership content. This role focuses on writing content that attracts business leaders, CTOs, product managers, and decision-makers looking for technology solutions.
responsibilities: Write high-quality content about custom software, AI automation, and digital transformation
Research technology trends and business challenges
Create educational content around software development, AI, and business systems
Develop case studies showcasing Xponent's work and client results
Write landing pages and service descriptions
Create industry comparisons and buying guides
Help develop content ideas that attract our target audience
Collaborate with product and marketing team
Improve content based on performance data and SEO insights
requirements: Strong writing ability in English
Ability to explain technical concepts simply and clearly
Understanding of B2B technology marketing
Research mindset and curiosity about technology
Portfolio of written work
SEO fundamentals knowledge
niceToHave: Experience writing about software development, AI, or technology services
Technical background or understanding of programming
B2B SaaS or technology services writing experience
SEO content experience
Familiarity with AI tools for content creation
whyJoin: Write about cutting-edge technology and innovation
Learn deeply about AI, automation, and software development
See your content directly impact business growth
Work with experienced technical team who can provide insights
Flexible remote work

careers.title: Community Marketing Specialist
careers.overview: We are looking for a Community Marketing Specialist to help grow Xponent's presence through conversations, relationships, and community engagement in technology and business communities. This role focuses on distribution and relationship-building, not just posting content.
responsibilities: Participate in technology communities (Reddit, LinkedIn, Discord, X, Hacker News)
Engage in business and startup communities where our audience exists
Answer questions related to software development, AI, and digital transformation
Build relationships with CTOs, product managers, and business leaders
Share insights and start meaningful discussions
Identify opportunities to introduce Xponent's services naturally
Track community insights and feedback
Report on community sentiment and market trends
Identify potential partnership or collaboration opportunities
requirements: Strong written communication skills
Understanding of technology or strong willingness to learn
Active participant in online communities
Curiosity and initiative to start conversations
Authentic and helpful communication style
Good judgment on when and how to mention products/services
niceToHave: Experience in community management or growth
Technical background or interest in software/AI
Startup or technology marketing exposure
Developer community engagement experience
successMetrics: Relationships built with potential clients or partners
whyJoin: Be the voice of an innovative technology company
Learn about cutting-edge technology and AI
Build a network in the tech and business community
Flexible, remote-friendly role
Direct impact on brand awareness and growth

careers.title: Outreach & Partnerships Representative
careers.overview: We are hiring an Outreach & Partnerships Representative to help expand Xponent through strategic partnerships, referral relationships, and targeted outreach to businesses, agencies, and technology vendors.
responsibilities: Identify potential agency partners and referral partners
Run cold outreach campaigns to businesses and decision-makers
Build relationships with CTOs, product leaders, and business owners
Develop partnerships with complementary technology vendors
Recruit affiliates and referral partners
Support partnership deal structuring and negotiation
Maintain outreach tracking and partnership pipeline
Attend industry events and networking opportunities (when applicable)
Create partnership proposals and collaboration frameworks
requirements: 2-4 years experience in outreach, partnerships, or B2B sales
Strong written and verbal communication
Organized approach to tracking conversations and relationships
Comfortable using outreach tools (email, LinkedIn, CRM)
Persistent and resilient in building relationships
Understanding of B2B technology landscape
niceToHave: Experience in technology partnerships or channel sales
Network in technology, agency, or consulting space
Understanding of software development or AI services
Startup business development experience
whyJoin: Build strategic relationships that drive real business impact
Work with innovative technology company
Own partnership strategy and execution
Commission or performance incentives
Remote flexibility

careers.title: Senior Product Engineer (Backend / NodeJS)
careers.overview: We are looking for a Senior Product Engineer to help architect and build scalable software platforms, AI-powered systems, and digital business solutions for our clients. This role is for engineers who think about systems, not just endpoints. You will work closely with the founders and clients to design backend architecture, improve reliability, and guide development teams.
responsibilities: Design scalable backend services using NodeJS and modern frameworks
Architect APIs and microservices communication
Build AI-powered automation systems and integrations
Improve system reliability, performance, and security
Implement queue systems and async processing for complex workflows
Support Dockerized deployments and CI/CD pipelines
Guide and mentor junior developers
Review code and enforce best practices
Improve logging, monitoring, and error tracking
Collaborate on product architecture decisions with clients
Participate in technical discovery and solution design
whatYouWillOwn: Code quality standards and technical direction
requirements: Strong NodeJS experience (5+ years preferred)
Experience building production SaaS products or enterprise systems
Strong understanding of backend architecture and system design
Experience with APIs, databases, queues, and async systems
Experience with Docker and containerization
Strong Git workflow understanding
Ability to think in systems and design for scale
Strong problem-solving and debugging skills
Good communication skills to work with clients and team
niceToHave: BullMQ, Redis Queue, or similar queue system experience
AWS, Google Cloud, or Azure knowledge
Redis and caching strategies
AI/ML integration experience (OpenAI, LangChain, vector databases)
Microservices architecture experience
Experience with TypeScript
PostgreSQL or MongoDB expertise
GraphQL experience
successMetrics: Architecture improvements and technical debt reduction
whyJoin: Work on diverse, cutting-edge AI and software projects
Solve real architecture challenges across industries
Own technical direction and make impactful decisions
Work in product-focused engineering environment
Opportunity to grow into technical leadership or CTO role
Learn AI, automation, and modern technology stacks
Work with clients directly on meaningful business problems
